case_title: TEN FORTY MASON STREET LLC VS. BRET KITTLE et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEN FORTY MASON STREET LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KITTLE, BRET
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEN FORTY MASON STREET LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEN FORTY MASON STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITTLE, BRET ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1040 MASON STREET, #301, SAN FRANCISCO $2,031.83 RENT, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $524.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,556.33, LEASE FORFEITED, (LESS CREDIT OF $3004.94 PAID TO PLAINTIFF ON FEB-14-2012) SEE SCANNED DOC

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KITTLE, BRET ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS
